title: 6 cut and paste Commands for Fast Column Shaping
summary: Reshape plain-text columns quickly with cut and paste commands for field extraction, character slicing, delimiter handling, and lightweight file merging.

test_environment.runtime: cut and paste available in a POSIX shell

verification_setup: Confirm cut and paste are installed.
Replace the example file names before running the commands.
Use sample files whose delimiters or line counts match the examples.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/cut_and_paste_commands_for_fast_column_shaping.sh with real local files.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example file names and delimiters with inputs that match your actual file format.
